mission.title: surrealdb: Feature: Rust SDK multiple functions within a Transaction

steps.title: Apply the fix for Feature: Rust SDK multiple functions within a Transaction
steps.description:
This implies that Transactions are not thread safe. Beginning a connection in one thread creates a race between closing it and making unrelated queries in other threads (as previously discussed). 

I'm not even sure if this is true because of the aforementioned. It sounds like all queries are not thread safe, because of the eager execution (even chained methods).

I agree that there needs to be a separate struct that holds transactions, which are not forwarded to the database eagerly, but

See the source issue for community-verified solutions.

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected.
Confirm the feature described in "Feature: Rust SDK multiple functions within a Transaction " is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary:
This implies that Transactions are not thread safe. Beginning a connection in one thread creates a race between closing it and making unrelated queries in other threads (as previously discussed). 

I'm not even sure if this is true because of the aforementioned. It sounds like all queries are not thread safe, because of the eager execution (even chained methods).

prerequisites.description: A working surrealdb installation or development environment.
